member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AgencyClientsController.GetClients
member.summary: Get all clients for the current agency

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AgencyClientsController.GetClient(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a specific client by ID

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AgencyClientsController.CreateClient(AdReport.Application.DTOs.AgencyClient.CreateAgencyClientDto)
member.summary: Create a new client

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AgencyClientsController.UpdateClient(System.Int32,AdReport.Application.DTOs.AgencyClient.UpdateAgencyClientDto)
member.summary: Update an existing client

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AgencyClientsController.DeleteClient(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a client

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(AdReport.Application.DTOs.Auth.RegisterRequestDto)
member.summary: Register a new agency

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(AdReport.Application.DTOs.Auth.LoginRequestDto)
member.summary: Login with email and password

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken(AdReport.Application.DTOs.Auth.RefreshTokenRequestDto)
member.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.MetaAccountsController.GetAccounts
member.summary: Returns all Meta ad accounts connected to the current agency.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.MetaAccountsController.ConnectAccount(AdReport.Application.DTOs.MetaAccount.ConnectMetaAccountDto)
member.summary: Validates and connects a new Meta ad account for a client.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.MetaAccountsController.DisconnectAccount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Disconnects (removes) a connected Meta ad account.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.MetaAccountsController.GetOAuthUrl(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the Facebook OAuth dialog URL the frontend should redirect the user to.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.MetaAccountsController.ExchangeOAuth(AdReport.Application.DTOs.MetaAccount.MetaOAuthExchangeDto)
member.summary: Exchanges an OAuth authorization code for a long-lived token and returns accessible ad accounts.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.MetaAccountsController.ConfirmOAuth(AdReport.Application.DTOs.MetaAccount.MetaOAuthConfirmDto)
member.summary: Confirms connecting a specific ad account selected from the OAuth exchange result.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.PublicReportController.GetPublicReport(System.String)
member.summary: Public endpoint — returns report data for a given slug. No authentication required.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportsController.CreateReport(AdReport.Application.DTOs.Report.CreateReportDto)
member.summary: Creates a new report and enqueues background generation.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetReports
member.summary: Returns all reports for the current agency.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportsController.GetReport(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a single report by ID.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportsController.DownloadReport(System.Int32)
member.summary: Downloads the generated PDF for a report.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportsController.SendEmail(System.Int32)
member.summary: Manually sends the report-ready email to the client.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportTemplateController.GetTemplate
member.summary: Returns the current agency's white-label template.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportTemplateController.UpdateTemplate(AdReport.Application.DTOs.Template.ReportTemplateUpdateDto)
member.summary: Updates colors and contact info for the white-label template.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.ReportTemplateController.UploadLogo(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Uploads a logo image (JPG/PNG/SVG/WebP, max 5 MB) and returns its public URL.

member.name: M:AdReport.API.Controllers.TestController.GetProtected
member.summary: Test endpoint that requires authentication

member.name: T:AdReport.API.Middleware.HangfireDashboardAuthFilter
member.summary: Restricts Hangfire dashboard to local requests in production.

member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
